title: Fix exit code failure
body:
Be less precise on the exit code and lot the exit code to the journal when it fails.

Signed-off-by: Daniel J Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

comments.body:

Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/libpod/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [rhatdan] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
See if this fixes the issue.  I see "Command not found", not "file not found".
@TomSweeneyRedHat that is what we are hoping for.
`[+1080s] [Fail] Podman run exit [It] podman run exit ExecErrorCodeNotFound ` in CGroupsV2
@cevich I added https://github.com/containers/libpod/pull/4054 to this one, to see if we can remove both of the failures

This will make master green again so
/lgtm
